name: offer-os
description: Offer OS — a numbered, sequential family of marketing skills that walk a business from problem to launch (1 define the problem -> 2 position the opportunity -> 3 build your frameworks -> 4 build the offer -> 5 build the funnel -> 6 add the software layer -> 7 launch the campaign). Config-driven and portable across businesses. Ships the /marketing-360 cross-cutting audit. Distills widely-taught direct-response and offer-design principles into reusable, business-agnostic skills.
